plugin_desc: 3Com switch SNMP collection (A3COM-HUAWEI-LswDEVM-MIB, IANA PEN 43). Beyond standard IF-MIB interface metrics, it collects 3Com private OIDs for device health: CPU utilisation (hwCpuCostRatePer1Min, the 1-minute busy ratio in percent, averaged across the per-board table) and memory (hwMemSize total + hwMemFree free in bytes, usage derived as (total-free)/total). This MIB (enterprise 43.45) differs from the already-supported H3C plugin (enterprise 25506 HH3C-ENTITY-EXT), hence a separate plugin. Temperature/fan/power are not exposed, so those are N/A. Supported brands/models — 3Com managed switches (Switch 4200/4500/5500 and other A3COM-HUAWEI platforms; enterprise 43).
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the 3Com switch (A3COM-HUAWEI-LswDEVM-MIB hwCpuCostRatePer1Min, averaged across boards).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total memory of the 3Com switch in bytes (hwMemSize).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the 3Com switch, derived as (total-free)/total.
